name: Yeong Jo Fried Rice B1
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Raw prawns or shrimp, diced
1/4 cup Barbecued pork, diced - OR - cooked ham, diced
1/4 cup Green onions, cut 1/8 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a preheated wok or skillet until it reaches a sizzling point.
2. Add prawns or shrimp and salt to the hot oil. Toss and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the prawns are cooked through.
3. Add pork or ham, green onions, peas, lettuce, rice, and soy sauce to the wok.
4. Press the rice gently into the pan and fry for a few seconds. Repeat this process until all the rice is hot throughout.
5. Turn the heat and mix rapidly for 5-7 minutes. Add a few drops of oil if necessary to prevent burning.
Time: 15 minutes
Difficulty: AVERAGE
